items.claim: Robert Whittaker can out-wrestle Khalil Rountree.
Terrance McKinney has not seen a second round since July of 2023.
items.quote: He has not seen a second round since July of 2023

items.claim: Terrance McKinney loses when he fights higher-level competition.
items.quote: he fights better fighters and he usually loses.

items.claim: Bobby Green is 39 years of age.
Bobby Green's shoulder roll defensive style is a liability against Terrance McKinney's power.
items.quote: I'm concerned about the shoulder roll here. Cuz we know Bobby just rolls with punches all the time... it's going to get dicey cuz Terrance McKinney just throws so hard.

items.claim: Bobby Green will win if he survives the first round against Terrance McKinney.
items.quote: if Bobby's able to get in the second, he's going to win. He will break Terrance McKinney
